items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 正式声明执行美国政府的出口管制指令，全面暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的访问（包括自有渠道与第三方 Azure 等分发）。这是区域性访问禁令而非模型下架，已接入 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的服务会收到 403/区域不可用错误，需立即迁移到 Claude Opus 4.8 或 Sonnet 等仍可用的型号。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：将代码中 model="claude-fable-5" / model="claude-mythos-5" 全部替换为可用模型（如 claude-opus-4-8）；检查托管区域是否在受限名单内，配置 fallback 路由并对 Fable/Mythos 路径加 feature flag 紧急关闭。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: 与工程无关。Anthropic 宣布 Claude Tag 作为团队协作使用 Claude 的新方式，但原文摘要被多条政策/招聘公告拼接污染，看不到具体产品定义与 API 形态。
items.backend_focus: 暂不行动：信息不完整，待 Anthropic 发布 Claude Tag 的 SDK/API 文档后再评估；目前无 SDK/参数层面改动需要跟进。

items.chinese_summary: 与工程无关。Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 国家级青年 fellowship 项目，面向早期职业人员推广 AI 在美国各社区的应用。这是人才/公益项目，不是产品或接口发布。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: 与工程无关。Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到约 150 个新组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家，属于企业 AI 安全/部署研究项目的扩容公告。不涉及 API/SDK/模型变更。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 正式发布 Claude Opus 4.8，作为 Opus 系列升级，重点强化编码、agentic 任务与专业工作场景。相对 Opus 4.5 在 coding benchmark 与长链路 agent 执行上有提升，但具体 context window、max_tokens 与 tool use 字段是否变化需查 release notes 确认。
items.backend_focus: 关注点：将生产流量逐步灰度切到 claude-opus-4-8，关注 Anthropic 控制台与 SDK（anthropic-sdk-python / -typescript）的最新版本；留意 Opus 4.5 的 deprecation 时间表与上下文窗口是否调整，必要时更新 max_tokens 与 system prompt 策略。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: 与工程无关。Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多项合作，属于区域扩张与企业合作公告，不涉及模型或接口变更。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: 与工程无关。Anthropic 发布首份「Public Record」结果摘要，原文摘要被截断，看不到具体技术内容；目前看是透明度/治理类披露而非 API 更新。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: 与工程无关。Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业（金融、医疗等），属于渠道合作公告。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: 与工程无关。Anthropic 与 DXC 达成联盟，将 Claude 集成到银行、航空等受监管行业依赖的核心系统中，属于集成合作公告。
